# StudyLah

> StudyLah (www.studylah.education) is an independent Singapore publisher of
> exam preparation for the Singapore-Cambridge O-Level (G3) and N(A)-Level
> (G2), 2026 sitting. For each subject it sells a data-driven Exam Forecast
> (every syllabus topic ranked into VERY HIGH / HIGH / MODERATE / WATCH
> confidence tiers, built from ten years of past papers), a subject-specific
> companion, original practice questions (Sure Questions Vault), and a full
> timed rehearsal paper with mark scheme. Every purchase also unlocks
> StudyLand, a daily study system: three targeted questions a day, a
> self-maintaining mistake notebook, a Marks-at-Risk meter, FastTrack
> answering-technique training, skill drills, exam timers, a printable rescue
> plan, and an opt-in weekly parent progress email. Forecasts are
> probabilistic predictions, not leaked or actual exam content; accuracy
> scorecards with hits AND misses are published after every sitting, and
> purchases carry a conditional money-back guarantee. StudyLah is not
> affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to SEAB, MOE, or Cambridge
> (UCLES).

Key facts:
- Coverage: 14 O-Level subjects and 8 N(A)-Level subjects (sciences, maths,
  humanities, POA, Nutrition & Food Science).
- Sciences and syllabus codes: O-Level Chemistry 6092, Physics 6091, Biology
  6093, Combined Science 5086/5087/5088; N(A)-Level Science Chemistry,
  Physics, Biology 5105/5106/5107.
- FastTrack: answering-technique system for O-Level and N-Level Chemistry,
  Physics and Biology. Marks are awarded for matching the mark scheme, and
  most students leak marks four ways: missing keywords, vague phrasing,
  wrong format, incomplete logic. FastTrack teaches examiner keywords, a
  3 to 4 step answer structure, instant question recognition, then drills
  each play with auto-marking.
- Pricing (SGD): per-subject tiers Essential / Strategic / Master; multi-
  subject Mega-Bundle (3+) and All-In (5-6) discounts; S$15/S$15 refer-a-
  friend programme.
- Delivery: instant PDF download, watermarked to the buyer, plus StudyLand
  access. iOS and Android app coming.
- Free tools: "Predict your mark", a 10-question auto-marked readiness check
  per subject with an indicative (never promised) grade band, and a free
  sample heatmap.
- Payments: PayNow, cards, Alipay, WeChat Pay (via Stripe).
